reading.title: Reading: Healthy habits
reading.passage: I usually exercise three times a week. I always wake up at six o'clock. I sometimes go to the cinema, maybe once a month. I rarely drink coffee, but I often drink tea every day.

questions.question: The writer always wakes up at six o'clock.
questions.explanation: "I always wake up at six o'clock."

questions.question: How often does the writer exercise?
questions.explanation: "I usually exercise three times a week."

reading.title: Reading: A study schedule
reading.passage: I am busy in the morning, so I usually study at night. I study from eight in the evening until midnight. The meeting is on a weekday, on Tuesday afternoon. I am free on the weekend.

questions.question: The writer studies in the morning.
questions.explanation: "I am busy in the morning, so I usually study at night."

questions.question: When is the meeting?
questions.explanation: "The meeting is on a weekday, on Tuesday afternoon."
